title: potentilla norvegica var. hirsuta
intro: Potentilla norvegica var. hirsuta, also known as hairy cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of tannins and flavonoids. The hairy cinquefoil has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating skin irritations, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Hairy cinquefoil can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
